programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.desc: Arizona Days

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Dial M for Murder
programme.desc: Tony plans to murder his wife when he finds out that she had an affair with someone a year ago He blackmails an old college associate to execute the crime but things dont work out as planned

programme.title: Rehearsal for Murder
programme.desc: Alex Dennison Robert Preston is a playwright engaged to actress Monica Welles Lynn Redgrave But on the opening night of her new Broadway play she kills herself over some bad reviews Thoroughly distraught Alex cant believe shed commit suicide and begins to suspect she was actually murdered Under the pretext of having them read for his new play Alex invites all of the suspicious parties to an empty theater and locks them in until the truth comes out

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles current boss A warehouse owner with a terminal disease wants to help Dr Kimble by impersonating him leading Lt Gerald to the Country of Greece and dying at sea

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike investigates the mysterious collision of two Navy destroyers

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mikes normally level-headed skindiving buddy begins to exhibit peculiar behavior

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gen Savage and a Nazi colonel are the only survivors in a raft after shooting down each others planes at sea but the Nazi tries to force him to surrender at gunpoint

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A scientist whos working on establishing contact with alien life finds his project in jeopardy when his loan shark comes to call Meanwhile another scientist is researching the communicative skills of an intelligent chimp but her arrogant boss seems to have more of an interest in torturing the animal than performing legitimate experiments

programme.title: Tales from Crypt
programme.desc: In a research lab when two colleagues accidentally inject an experimental virus into their sleazy boss that will eventually kill him he tries to get revenge on them believing it was no accident

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Danny Darwin learns that his new tattoo might be more than just a tattoo

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A female artists nightmares cause her to lose herself in self-pity mixed with egotism

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: An indebted conman meats his match

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways start disappearing one by one and when the remaining castaways discover that headhunters have not taken them Gilligan begins to think hes a Dr Jeckyll and Mr Hyde and has killed them all

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An unattractive and lovelorn woman named Eva Grubb comes to the island to escape civilization and offers the castaways her boat But before they can leave the women give her a makeover and turn her into a Ginger Grant lookalike

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Pepino feels his job is threatened when Grampa takes on another hired hand

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa wants nothing to do with his wealthy new neighbors

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL couriers are disappearing on airliners Max is assigned as the next courier and has to solve the mystery or die

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 portray look alike ex-cons Connie and Floyd Bonnie and Clyde! to find out where their mentor hid all his stolen loot

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: It was a dark and stormy night when BJ and the Bear drove two Transylvanian coffins from Frisco to LA meeting up along the way with murder mayhem and maybe even Count Dracula

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and his neighbor Roger are banished to the barn by their wives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While awaiting word to complete a sabotage mission Stalag 13 gets a new officer under Klink - Burkhalters alert brother-in-law who enjoys tormenting prisoners

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground Hogan causes a marital tiff which to fix requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age

programme.title: Mchale 404
programme.desc: Mchale 404

programme.title: Mchale 407
programme.desc: Mchale 407

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: Captain Newman MD
programme.desc: In 1944 an Army doctor is in charge of a neuropsychiatric ward at an Army Air Corps hospital in Arizona and he must deal with a variety of tough cases

programme.title: American Guerrilla In The Philippines
programme.desc: American soldiers stranded in the Philippines after the Japanese invasion form guerrilla bands to fight back

programme.title: Attack Force Nam
programme.desc: A group of Australian commandos launch a secret mission against Japanese forces in World War II

programme.title: Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Wizard of Speed and Time
programme.desc: A Hollywood filmmaker Mike Jittlov makes a short for an evil film studio Unbeknownest to him the producer has placed a bet of 25000 that he wont come up with anything with a use Luckily our film creator gets the help of his friends

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr Belmans daughter does human testing on herself with an accelerant that causes her to rapidly evolve Joshua Doors decides somebody should run against President Thompson in the election somebody who will stand up to the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: When a severe heat wave strikes the aliens cut off the citys water supply and exploit a local reverend to drive humans into worshipping the Morthren Eternal

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A young loner who believes he is a vampire is accused of murdering his mothers boyfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After seemingly having no interest for so many episodes what happened to Jim Tressa is suddenly in Peru and sidetracked by a voice from her past on a radio

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alpha is on the verge of being destroyed by intense shockwaves emanating from a planet they are approaching The Alphans land on the planet seemingly devoid of any human existence but being run by a group of machines The machines explain to the visitors that their human overlords are in a state of regeneration but the chief machine the Guardian sees the Alphans as a threat and it is down to two newly regenerated females known as A and B to decide their fates

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Drama follows a 25-caliber gun over a week-end and the various lives with which it comes into contact

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The teams latest mission has them trying to root out a network of spies who were brought in by an American photographer The problem is the code that he and his handlers communicate with is unbreakable So they devise a plan to get him to reveal the method of decoding his communications And their plan has him asking for Cinnamon to pose for him During their photo shoot she displays knowledge of bio chemistry which the photographer decides to exploit

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Psycho II
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Wade Baldwin vs. Damon Steadman; Ryan Starkell vs. Travis Triskle; Chris Wilson vs. Ron Gonzales; Matt Zemlak vs. David Swanson.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Adam Zarrillo v. Mike Papesquash.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 22 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. James Haddad vs. Steve Simms; Barrett "Too Cool" Thompson vs. Mike Goehr; Patrick Besarra vs. Reza Kamali.

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.desc: To save time the Pride goes through instead of around the Phantom Nebula to warn the legendary Swap Witch of Saw Boss imminent arrival Flora feels her presence and Swamp Witch reveals herself to Flora The witch has special communication powers
